display_text: Oblivion Staff, Cost: 1625: A versatile mid-game item that enhances sustained spellcasting and right-click output. The mana regeneration and attack speed improve a hero's overall DPS and farming speed in prolonged engagements or when clearing waves and camps. It provides no defensive or active abilities.

display_text: Oblivion Staff, Cost: 1625: Core building block for intelligence heroes who rely on attack speed and need to address early mana issues, such as Storm Spirit, Leshrac, or Windranger. Often rushed as a first major component to accelerate farm and fighting potential. An efficient stepping stone to powerful single-target or area control items.
